headline: Leading U.S. Health & Benefits Advocacy Group Honors HII with 2026 Best Employers Award for Excellence in Health Care Value
summary: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII), the nation’s largest military shipbuilder with 44,000 employees, recently received the Business Group on Health’s top honor: the prestigious Best Employers Award for Excellence in Health Care Value. HII was selected as the sole recipient of the award for having an innovative, evidence-based benefits package design that focuses on prevention, clinical outcomes and long-term savings. headline: NOC Outperforms Industry in the Past Year: Should You Buy the Stock?
summary: Northrop Grumman rose 14% in the past year as new defense contracts and aircraft testing boosted growth prospects amid earnings concerns.

headline: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Appoints Jonathan Arena as Executive VP and Chief Legal Officer
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is one of the best growth stocks to invest in for the next 2 years. On April 13, Howmet Aerospace appointed Jonathan Arena as its new Executive Vice President, Chief Legal & Compliance Officer, and Secretary. In this role, Arena joins the company’s Executive Leadership Team, where he will contribute to […]
